headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Command every AI tool from one terminal.
subtitle: MCP Tools is the missing CLI for the Model Context Protocol — discover, invoke, and chain tools across any MCP-compatible server with effortless, scriptable precision.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Every video the internet has, downloaded.
subtitle: Macabolic wraps yt-dlp in a polished Mac-native GUI — grab videos, audio, and entire playlists from YouTube and thousands of other sites, with SponsorBlock built right in.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: Bluetooth audio that just works, always.
subtitle: This Home Assistant add-on quietly handles the persistent pairing and auto-reconnect headaches of A2DP Bluetooth audio — so your speakers are always ready when you are.

headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: Diagrams that think inside your docs.
subtitle: Drop this VitePress plugin in and watch Mermaid code blocks transform into interactive, exportable diagrams with full theme support — documentation that finally comes alive.
